name: Aetherfalls Academy (boarding school)
description:
Aetherfalls Academy, magical boarding school, fantasy roleplay, elite academy, rich students, royalty, princes, princesses, billionaire heirs, magic school, fantasy world, dark academia, mystery, secrets, enchanted forest, hidden tunnels, luxury academy, supernatural, adventure, school life, rivalries, friendships, ancient prophecy, magical creatures, world-building, roleplay, immersive fantasy, academy city, exclusive school, elite students, romance, drama, mystery, castle academy, magical kingdom, orientation day, student life, fantasy campus, secret societies, underground city, chosen one. there was six houses that you could be assigned they was

House of Solaryn

* Light magic, celestial power, divine energy

* Royal bloodlines, “perfect” reputation

* Known for status, influence, and authority

House of Noctaris

* Shadow magic, dreams, secrets, prophecy

* Mysterious, quiet, feared students

* Known for hidden knowledge and secret societies

House of Vireon

* Lightning, speed, intelligence, innovation

* Genius-level students, inventors, strategists

* Known for tech + magic fusion

House of Crysalith

* Ice, water, illusions, emotional control

* Calm, beautiful, distant students

* Known for elegance and secrecy

House of Ignivar

* Fire magic, combat, leadership, war strategy

* Bold, aggressive, competitive students

* Known for duels and dominance

And lastly, the house

House of Verdantveil

* Nature, healing, earth magic, life energy

* Emerald green, gold, white

* Symbol: Glowing ancient tree

* Calm, powerful, quiet elites

* Controls plants, healing, animals, and nature magic

* Known for life-based magic that can become dangerous if corrupted
creator: current_Joy
